_readme: PHASE 3d SPIRAL-FIX cycle (ladder4): the ladder3 tempo recipe (dense VP + placement/farm/reward aux, gamma .999, PPO, 512 games/gen, 60 gens, win-bonus-halflife 8, selfPlayFraction .35) PLUS four changes targeting the corruption->Fallen spiral that Michael beat live: (1) obs v1.2 (OBS_DIM 77->83): an own-location block (destination one-hot + at-Abyss flag) so the net can finally tell WHICH location's interaction row it is scoring (the Arcane Abyss Summon was indistinguishable from any other row); (2) shapingPreset 'ascend2' = ascend + faceDown credit (an unawakened summon earns some potential) + a NEGATIVE status weight (descending the corruption ladder LOSES potential -> the spiral is penalized, policy-invariant Phi-of-state); (3) TEMPERATURE ANNEAL 1.0->0.65 over gens 1-40 then hold, so training ends AT the 0.65 deployment sampling temp; (4) engine now carries deflect-reflection (a883446) + final-scoring-at-cap (96ec2e3). main-0 WARM-STARTS from the ladder3 gen-60 champion expanded 77->83 with zero columns (byte-identical outputs at gen 1) -> gen-1 eval should be STRONG immediately.
